title: PokeMayhem
description: The Official Pixelmon Modpack for the PokeMayhem Server!
body:
Welcome to **PokeMayhem Pixelmon**!

**Server IP**: play.pokemayhem.com

**Discord**: https://discord.gg/wnHZDSJ

**Website**: https://www.pokemayhem.com

PokeMayhem always runs the latest version of Pixelmon Reforged. (adds over 1000 Pokemon!)

**What to expect from PokeMayhem?**

 

PokeMayhem has been a exciting community for over 10 years providing a fun and unique server experience.
Our 1.16.5 Version of Pixelmon provides 2 immersive story line maps with over 300 hours of gameplay along with the classic survival based experience. Our goal is to provide our community with the best possible experiences as well as the help and support you would expect to receive.

We also aim to provide the best custom content to enhance our players experience with some examples being:
Custom Created Stories & Quests, PokeBuilder, Custom Starter Selection, Raids and Custom Bosses. If you haven't joined already then this is a Pokemon experience you dont want to miss out on!

 

Pixelmon, powered by: https://pixelmonmod.com/
